title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.526 - Veterans Memorial Expressway designated for portion of Highway 54 in Camden County
text:
227.526.  Veterans Memorial Expressway designated for portion of Highway 54 in Camden County. — The portion of Highway 54 from the Grand Glaize Bridge in Camden County to Key Largo Road in Camden County shall be designated the "Veterans Memorial Expressway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway with costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2015 H.B. 522, et al. merged with S.B. 156)
